comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Phase-preserving beat-jumps shipped (spec 1.7.5): jump DISTANCE quantized to whole bars/beats relative to playhead (Traktor-style) — kick/snare bar structure survives jumps; splice on next beat boundary (≤1 beat wait). Needs user listen-test. Open: STR001 genre/buy/donate URLs.
